statement: Hyperscaler custom-silicon deployments are scaling, with Anthropic committing to up to one million Google TPUs and AWS having deployed more than one million Trainium processors.
why: Massive committed and deployed ASIC volumes show hyperscalers meeting more of their AI compute needs with custom silicon.

impact.mechanism: Large TPU and Trainium commitments expand ASIC demand and displace some merchant-GPU demand for inference and training.

evidence.source: Tom's Hardware custom AI ASIC state of play
evidence.excerpt: Anthropic committed to up to one million TPUs in the largest deal in Google Cloud history back in October
